title: Quantum Pulse Dashboard
description: A high-performance financial analytics dashboard with real-time data streaming.
fullDescription:
## Overview
This project was designed for high-frequency traders who need split-second insights.

### Key Features
- Real-time WebSockets
- D3.js powered visualizations
- Ultra-low latency rendering

title: Eco-Trace Mobile
description: A cross-platform mobile application for tracking personal carbon footprint.
fullDescription:
## The Mission
Helping individuals understand their environmental impact through automated activity tracking.

### Impact
Over 10,000 active users reducing their footprint by an average of 15%.
